zh.lifeSummary: 當Randal MAINWARING於1363年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福時，他的父親William De Mainwaring IV of chester47歲，母親Elizabeth De Leicester45歲。他於1391年與Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton在英國英格蘭爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年在他的家鄉享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randal MAINWARING于1363年出生在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福时，他的父亲William De Mainwaring IV of chester47岁，母亲Elizabeth De Leicester45岁。他于1391年与Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton在英国英格兰爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年在他的家乡享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: MAINWARING
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Randal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

variants.name: Raonull
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Rannal
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

en.lifeSummary: When Randal MAINWARING was born in 1363, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, was 47 and his mother, Elizabeth De Leicester, was 45. He married Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton in 1391, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randal MAINWARING est né en 1363, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Leicester, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton en 1391, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Randal MAINWARING 1363 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Mainwaring IV of chester 47 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De Leicester 45. Er hat 1391 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1456 im Alter von 93 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randal MAINWARING è nato il nel 1363 nel Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth De Leicester, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton nel 1391, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Randal MAINWARINGが1363年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた時，父William De Mainwaring IV of chesterは47歳，母Elizabeth De Leicesterは45歳であった。1391年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでMargery Venables Lady of Kindertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年に故郷で93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Randal MAINWARING(이)가 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Mainwaring IV of chester(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De Leicester(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 그의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Randal MAINWARING nasceu em 1363, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Leicester, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton em 1391, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randal MAINWARING родился в 1363 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Mainwaring IV of chester было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Leicester, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton в 1391 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Randal MAINWARING nació en 1363, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William De Mainwaring IV of chester, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Leicester, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton en 1391, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años.
